license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdd2i28e
title: Non-radioactive phosphorylation with T4 PNK (M0201)
author: New England   Biolabs

steps_raw.instruction: Set up the following reaction in a microcentrifuge tube On ice : A B 1 Reagent Volume 2 DNA up to 300 pmol of 5´ termini 3 T4 PNK Reaction Buffer (10X) 5 µl 4 ATP (10 mM) 5 µl 5 T4 PNK 1 µl (10 units) 6 Nuclease-free Water up to 50 µl ATP is not supplied 1X T4 DNA Ligase Buffer contains 1 mM ATP and can be substituted in non-radioactive phosphorylations (T4 Polynucleotide Kinase exhibits 100% activity in this buffer).
Heat inactivate by incubating at 65 °C for 00:20:00 .
